signals.market_title: Will the official trailer for Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse be released Worldwide before Apr 1, 2026?

model_predictions.reasoning: The movie has a confirmed June 2027 release date and producers are dropping hints about showing footage soon, indicating active development. With 14+ months until the April 2026 deadline, there's ample time for a trailer release, which typically comes 6-12 months before theatrical release. The market at 9% appears severely underpriced given the positive producer signals and standard marketing timelines.
Bull case: market at 0.09, sentiment is neutral (90% conf). Adjusting up by 17% for bull thesis.
Bear case: market at 0.09, sentiment is neutral (90% conf). Adjusting down by 7% for bear thesis.
